offer: For accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/month, inaccurate categorization causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated categorization instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate categorization of procurement spend leading to cash flow gaps.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for accounting firms
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to accounting firms with demo video
Community forums for accounting tools and resources
try_it: Let users try invoice categorization on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
